title: CozyCraft
description: A very lightweight modpack with very little content, mainly adding features.
body:
![titre mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83fdad6abba8aec325df28e0e446bc22fa13e6ff.png)

## 📜 Full Description

Rediscover Minecraft in its **smoothest, most beautiful, and most enjoyable form** thanks to this **ultra-lightweight modpack**, designed to improve the game **without changing its core identity**.
With **fewer than 50 mods**, this pack focuses on what truly matters: **performance, comfort, and fun**, both in singleplayer and with friends.

No heavy mechanics or radical changes here. Everything is designed to make Minecraft **faster**, **better-looking**, and **more convenient**, while staying true to the vanilla experience. Each mod has been carefully selected to provide maximum improvements with minimal impact on performance.

Whether you’re playing on a low-end PC or simply want a clean, optimized experience, this modpack lets you enjoy a **fast, stable, and modern Minecraft**, perfect for long and relaxed sessions with friends.

![Bare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7608bf5210a63a4525b3507ad8fdb4a6ec665d9b_0.webp)

## 🧩 Main Mods

### ⚡ Optimization & Performance

* **Sodium** greatly improves performance and overall game smoothness.
* **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)** optimizes chunk loading and management for a more responsive world.

### 🎨 Visuals & Graphics

* **Iris** allows the use of shaders for enhanced visuals.
* **Continuity** adds connected textures for a more consistent and polished look.

### 🛠️ Quality of Life & Comfort

* **Carry On** lets you move chests, entities, and blocks easily.
* **Armored Elytra** allows you to fly without giving up your armor.
* **Bridging Mod** and **Accurate Block Placement Reborn** improve building precision.
* **FallingTree** makes chopping trees faster and more natural.
* **Shulker Box Tooltip** lets you see shulker box contents without opening them.

### 📦 Light Content & New Blocks

* **Farmer’s Delight (Fabric)** expands farming and cooking.
* **Storage Delight** and **Storage Drawers** improve storage without unnecessary complexity.

### 🎉 Fun & Multiplayer

* **PatPat (Mod & Plugin)** adds fun and friendly interactions with friends.
* **Essential** makes it easy to play with friends without a dedicated server.
* **Simple Voice Chat** lets you talk directly in-game for better immersion.

![Bare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7608bf5210a63a4525b3507ad8fdb4a6ec665d9b_0.webp)

## ⚠️Attention:
**For all versions from 1.0.0.0 to X, remember to activate the official resource pack in the game options to fully enjoy the mod pack's custom interface!** _(not required)_

![ef](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7937b1edd853df89b393fb0f59512a8efe0f04d.png)
